regime_reason: Yesterday's acute risk_off tail resolved benignly -- June CPI came in cool (headline 3.5% vs 3.8% est, core 2.6%), the July rate HIKE is now off the table (CME 85.6% hold), oil plunged ~21% to ~$77 on the mid-June ceasefire and reopened Strait of Hormuz, VIX fell to ~16.5 and the S&P/Nasdaq sit near record highs (Dow at an intraday ATH, ASML's raised AI-capex guide lifting chips 7/15) -- but a September Fed HIKE is still expected (0% cuts priced, ~42% chance of a year-end hike), breadth is narrow (~49% above 20dma) and the AI/tech rotation persists (IBM -25% on an AI-spend warning), so this is a constructive upgrade off risk_off, not a clean risk_on.
